title: Poached Moroccan Tomato Stir-fry
description: A sweet and juicy one-pot Moroccan dish featuring cilantro leaves, perfect for a low-carb-friendly breakfast or snack.

ingredients.name: Garlic cloves
ingredients.notes: Minced for added depth of flavor

instructions: Heat olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add onions and garlic, sauté for about 2 minutes until translucent.
Halve tomatoes lengthwise and place them in the skillet. Sprinkle pomegranate molasses on top of each tomato.
Cover the skillet with a lid and cook at low-medium heat for approximately 5-7 minutes or until tomatoes are tender but not mushy.
Stir in cilantro leaves just before serving to preserve color and flavor.
